programme.title: Escape To The Country
programme.desc: With their budget of 440,000 pounds, the couple from the Buckinghamshire commuter belt, are looking forward to their retirement in a new, single-storey home on the majestic Isle of Wight.

programme.title: Kochie's Business Builders
programme.desc: Online vet platform Your Vet Online is already helping thousands of pet owners get expert advice without leaving home. Founder Dr Leigh Davidson is launching a new consumer-facing brand, Pet Matters.

programme.title: South Aussie With Cosi
programme.desc: This week on South Aussie with Cosi, we hop aboard an unforgettable houseboat, relive the past through photography, visit Birdwood Primary School and explore the Blue Lake Holiday Park.

programme.title: Better Homes And Gardens
programme.desc: Joh and Ed go on a Snowy Mountains road trip. Graham gets a tour of Green Camel, Australia's largest organic glass house garden facility. Dr Harry and James show off the latest in dog toys.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Vinnie the vulture visits the Thirsk practice with problems that are preventing him from strutting his stuff. At the Great Yorkshire Show there's pole climbing and a fashion parade.

programme.title: Australia's Big Backyards
programme.desc: Join Australia’s much-loved gardening gurus Jason Hodges and Graham Ross for a ringside seat to some of Australia’s most extraordinary gardens and magical festivals.

programme.title: The Aussie Property Flippers
programme.desc: In the season final, Darren and Sean attempt the largest, most expensive reno ever on the show. Also, Trish returns to tackle a challenging 2 storey weatherboard in southwest Sydney.

programme.title: Escape To The Country
programme.desc: With their budget of 440,000 pounds, the couple from the Buckinghamshire commuter belt, are looking forward to their retirement in a new, single-storey home on the majestic Isle of Wight.

programme.title: The Coroner
programme.desc: When a treasure hunter is found dead in his own home, Jane wonders whether one of his colleagues wanted the loot for themselves, while the locals fear it was something more supernatural.

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: The detective investigates a suspicious fire that rips through a holiday park on the coast, destroying three cabins and claiming the life of the resort owner's sister.

programme.title: Maternal
programme.desc: Maryam finds out there's going to be an investigation into the Edward Williams case and fears her old doubts and anxieties are returning, while Catherine struggles to get surgical hours as staffing problems mean operations are cancelled. Helen feels the tensions in her marriage worsen when her estranged sister Debbie arrives on the ward, much to the annoyance of Guy, who sees her as little more than an addict and a drunk. Medical drama, starring Parminder Nagra, Lara Pulver and Lisa McGrillis.

programme.title: The Coroner
programme.desc: When a treasure hunter is found dead in his own home, Jane wonders whether one of his colleagues wanted the loot for themselves, while the locals fear it was something more supernatural.

programme.title: Harry's Practice
programme.desc: Join Dr Harry Cooper and Dr Katrina Warren for everything you need to know about animals.

programme.title: Better Homes And Gardens
programme.desc: Joh and Ed go on a Snowy Mountains road trip. Graham gets a tour of Green Camel, Australia's largest organic glass house garden facility. Dr Harry and James show off the latest in dog toys.

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: The detective investigates a suspicious fire that rips through a holiday park on the coast, destroying three cabins and claiming the life of the resort owner's sister.

programme.title: Million Dollar Minute
programme.desc: Million Dollar Minute is a battle of general knowledge, where every correct answer is a step closer to the ultimate test: Can one person, in one minute, win one million dollars?

programme.title: Million Dollar Minute
programme.desc: Million Dollar Minute is a battle of general knowledge, where every correct answer is a step closer to the ultimate test: Can one person, in one minute, win one million dollars?

programme.title: Surf Patrol
programme.desc: Lifesavers are faced with the most critical medical emergency imaginable; a young man is found floating face-down in the surf. What transpires over the next 24 minutes is compelling and heroic.

programme.title: Our Town
programme.desc: A look at various Australian destinations to see why people should visit, live, work, play and invest locally, both regionally and in metropolitan regions.

programme.title: Australia's Deadliest
programme.desc: Three people suffer venomous bites from three very different Australian creatures that can kill in minutes: a box jellyfish, a red-bellied black snake, and a redback spider.

programme.title: House Calls To The Rescue
programme.desc: The team rescues a couple suffering a giant hangover from a garden clean-up gone wrong, plus the businessman who runs his company from a linen closet, and the laundry with no door.

programme.title: Harry's Practice
programme.desc: Join Dr Harry Cooper and Dr Katrina Warren for everything you need to know about animals.

programme.title: Million Dollar Minute
programme.desc: Million Dollar Minute is a battle of general knowledge, where every correct answer is a step closer to the ultimate test: Can one person, in one minute, win one million dollars?

programme.title: Million Dollar Minute
programme.desc: Million Dollar Minute is a battle of general knowledge, where every correct answer is a step closer to the ultimate test: Can one person, in one minute, win one million dollars?

programme.title: Medical Rookies
programme.desc: Rookie surgeon Mary operates on a trauma patient critically injured when a tree fell on his car. She must stop his internal bleeding or he could die on the operating table. Hosted by Jennifer Keyte.

programme.title: NBC Today
programme.desc: International news and weather including interviews with newsmakers in the world of politics, business, media, entertainment and sport.

programme.title: Better Homes And Gardens
programme.desc: Joh and Pete tour a QLD beach home that could be yours to win. Graham, Charlie and Melissa are in Melbourne for the biggest floral and garden show in the southern hemisphere.

programme.title: The Great Australian Doorstep
programme.desc: Spida Everitt chats about his trip to India with Phil and Taz, where he travelled from Kochi, Kerala, to Shillong, Menghalaya in autorickshaws.

programme.title: Better Homes And Gardens
programme.desc: Joh and Ed go on a Snowy Mountains road trip. Graham gets a tour of Green Camel, Australia's largest organic glass house garden facility. Dr Harry and James show off the latest in dog toys.

programme.title: The Aussie Property Flippers
programme.desc: In the season final, Darren and Sean attempt the largest, most expensive reno ever on the show. Also, Trish returns to tackle a challenging 2 storey weatherboard in southwest Sydney.

programme.title: Weekender
programme.desc: A sea of sunflowers on a Scenic Rim drive. Canine stars put their best paws forward for a Brisbane festival. A sweet visit to Montville and Alastair gives a tropical twist to a French favourite.

programme.title: Auction Squad
programme.desc: The Auction Squad team dramatically transform a two-bedroom weatherboard cottage.

programme.title: Harry's Practice
programme.desc: Join Dr Harry Cooper and Dr Katrina Warren for everything you need to know about animals.

programme.title: Medical Rookies
programme.desc: Rookie surgeon Mary operates on a trauma patient critically injured when a tree fell on his car. She must stop his internal bleeding or he could die on the operating table. Hosted by Jennifer Keyte.

programme.title: Better Homes And Gardens
programme.desc: Joh and Ed go on a Snowy Mountains road trip. Graham gets a tour of Green Camel, Australia's largest organic glass house garden facility. Dr Harry and James show off the latest in dog toys.

programme.title: Escape To The Country
programme.desc: Today's couple want to spend their retirement in the peace and quiet of the Scottish borders and Alistair Appleton is on hand to help them find the perfect pad for their 350k budget.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Charlie Ross travels to Shrewsbury in Shropshire, where Tim Weeks and Ben Cooper provide expert help as the red and blue teams compete to see who can make the most profit at auction. Charlie goes round the fair quizzing members of the public on a rather unusual antique he has brought along.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: The Doc clashes with the new district midwife, whose natural methods put Louisa's health at risk. Bert takes a shine to a new employee at the restaurant, but her culinary preferences leave something to be desired.

programme.title: A Touch Of Frost
programme.desc: While investigating the death of a hunt saboteur, Frost suspects foul play and launches a murder inquiry. But the close-knit village at the centre of his investigation, doesn't welcome inquisitive strangers and Frost gets an icy reception.

programme.title: Ambulance: Code Red
programme.desc: A car wash employee is stabbed during an argument, a builder falls 12 feet onto concrete from the roof of a farm building, and a six-year-old is hit by a car while leaving school.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: The Doc clashes with the new district midwife, whose natural methods put Louisa's health at risk. Bert takes a shine to a new employee at the restaurant, but her culinary preferences leave something to be desired.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Charlie Ross travels to Shrewsbury in Shropshire, where Tim Weeks and Ben Cooper provide expert help as the red and blue teams compete to see who can make the most profit at auction. Charlie goes round the fair quizzing members of the public on a rather unusual antique he has brought along.

programme.title: Harry's Practice
programme.desc: Join Dr Harry Cooper and Dr Katrina Warren for everything you need to know about animals.

programme.title: Medical Rookies
programme.desc: Rookie surgeon Mary operates on a trauma patient critically injured when a tree fell on his car. She must stop his internal bleeding or he could die on the operating table. Hosted by Jennifer Keyte.

programme.title: Better Homes And Gardens
programme.desc: Joh and Ed go on a Snowy Mountains road trip. Graham gets a tour of Green Camel, Australia's largest organic glass house garden facility. Dr Harry and James show off the latest in dog toys.

programme.desc: Million Dollar Minute is a battle of general knowledge, where every correct answer is a step closer to the ultimate test: Can one person, in one minute, win one million dollars?

programme.title: Million Dollar Minute
programme.desc: Million Dollar Minute is a battle of general knowledge, where every correct answer is a step closer to the ultimate test: Can one person, in one minute, win one million dollars?

programme.title: Surf Patrol
programme.desc: Swimmers are banned from the water at Surfers Paradise as the patrol team launches a desperate search for a missing nine-year-old girl. Hosted by Tom Williams.

programme.title: Our Town
programme.desc: A look at various Australian destinations to see why people should visit, live, work, play and invest locally, both regionally and in metropolitan regions.

programme.title: Australia's Deadliest
programme.desc: A sea lion attacks a teenage skier, while a young girl is stung by the deadly Irukandji jellyfish, and a first-time spear fisherman is mauled by a shark.

programme.title: Escape To The Country
programme.desc: Today's couple want to spend their retirement in the peace and quiet of the Scottish borders and Alistair Appleton is on hand to help them find the perfect pad for their 350k budget.

programme.desc: Join Dr Harry Cooper and Dr Katrina Warren for everything you need to know about animals.

programme.title: Million Dollar Minute

programme.title: Medical Rookies
programme.desc: Meet the young medical trainees at Westmead Hospital, Australia's biggest teaching hospital. Hosted by JENNIFER KEYTE.

programme.title: NBC Today
programme.desc: International news and weather including interviews with newsmakers in the world of politics, business, media, entertainment and sport.

programme.title: Better Homes And Gardens
programme.desc: Joh meets a husband and wife team renovating caravans with some style; Karen makes chocolate salted self-saucing pudding; Adam builds a set of shelves perfect for your kid's bedroom.

programme.title: Escape To The Country
programme.desc: Today's couple want to spend their retirement in the peace and quiet of the Scottish borders and Alistair Appleton is on hand to help them find the perfect pad for their 350k budget.

programme.title: Creek To Coast
programme.desc: We're on the fairway with Lions favourite, Cam Rayner. Braving the rain for a flathead bonanza. Australia's best Hipcamp and cooking up the crispiest campfire potatoes you've ever tasted.
